Introduction
    In a realm of three kingdoms, princess Jiu Yao loses her identity. Disguised as a man in Qing Shui, she meets Tu Shan Jing and demon Xiang Liu who are drawn to her. Her cousin Qiang Xuan searches as her future remains uncertain.
